name: feature.forms.nodes
description: Forms feature node pack (ADR 0014) — read nodes over the ctx.features.forms surface shipped by the Forms feature package. list-forms reads an org's forms; list-submissions reads a form's captured submissions.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Forms: List Forms
nodes.description: Lists an org's forms over ctx.features.forms. Tenant-guarded.

nodes.label: Forms: List Submissions
nodes.description: Lists a form's captured submissions over ctx.features.forms. Tenant+org-guarded.
